description: A brand manager needs to create a comprehensive document outlining the brand's visual identity.

nodes.task_description: Gather all core brand assets: logo files, color palette (hex codes), and font families.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all the necessary brand assets.

nodes.task_description: Create a document that specifies rules for logo usage (e.g., clear space, minimum size).

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly defines how the logo should and should not be used.

nodes.task_description: Add sections for the primary and secondary color palettes and typography rules (e.g., font sizes for headlines vs. body text).

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a complete visual style guide.
